metadata.description: Standalone landing-page CRO agent for Claude Code. Builder-agnostic (Shopify, WordPress, Webflow, Squarespace, Wix, Framer, HubSpot CMS, custom HTML). Goal-agnostic (lead forms, ecommerce, signups, bookings, content unlocks, app installs). Form-agnostic. Instrumented funnel with 6 canonical events + conversion attribution bridge, ICE-ranked experiment backlog, weekly never-go-dark sweep, LP review framework, content virality discipline, brand palette audit.

plugins.name: landing-page-agent
plugins.description: Standalone landing-page CRO agent — onboarding questionnaire, multi-builder / multi-goal / multi-form-tool support, PostHog A/B engine, continuous experimentation, LP review framework, content virality, brand palette audit, and a bundled build-craft playbook (Phosphor-duotone icon system, ASCII-clean encoding, interaction polish).
